programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry is in awe of the concept of work-to-rule; Lisa tries setting boundaries between her and her stepson; Nisha accidentally reveals too much to her students.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: When Mark finally gets the chance to take the stage as a stand-up comedian, he realizes he doesn't have his own distinct voice; Mark draws inspiration from those who matter the most to him.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: It's the end of school year; Mark is faced with changes and challenges ahead, but when he's tasked with giving the graduation speech he takes some time to reflect on how his friends and family shaped him.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Mark starts high school at a former girls' school, finding joy in theater while navigating old friendships and new love; pop's ham radio hobby leads him to an intercepted distress signal.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Tensions rise between rival schools as Fox finds a friend who invites her to a field party; Mark worries about older kids; Mike Jr hires Dick's daughter as the new VOCM promo girl.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Mark uncovers proof Sister Rose cheated but hesitates to publish; Mike Sr. covers the Meech Lake Accord as Mary scores an exclusive; Pop does some redecorating.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa and Umma meet their new neighbor; Jung starts a new work romance; Janet doesn't like how sweet Gerald's new girlfriend is.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa inherits a smartphone; Umma discovers a pest in the store; Kimchee tries to help Janet with her F.O.M.O.; Jung tries to reconnect with a girl.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Umma wants the family to celebrate Jung getting his GED; Janet gets tired of being the good one; Jung struggles to tell Shannon about a new opportunity.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: When Umma wants a new dishwasher, Appa is determined to get the best deal; Janet adopts a new name; Jung tries to get his job back at Handy.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa tries to convince Umma that he's still attractive; Jung returns to Handy; Gerald's girlfriend makes herself at home.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa and Umma unwittingly end up in marriage counseling; Jung learns more about Shannon's boyfriend than he bargained for; Janet debates whether or not to share a potential mentor with Gerald.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Lisa runs for the unopposed PTA president position as a way to punish the staff.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: When Gerry meets a DJ at the gym, he offers her a job at the school dance, but Robert has banned dances and won't budge on his position.

programme.title: Strays
programme.desc: Shannon makes Hugh and Liam an offer that calls her relationship with Jeffrey into question; Nikki is closely connected to her new friend; Joy helps Paul send a care package to his daughter.

programme.title: Baroness von Sketch Show
programme.desc: A waiter makes a recommendation; an explanation of work friends versus Facebook friends; trivia night fights.

programme.title: CBC Winnipeg Comedy Festival
programme.desc: Hosted by Andrew Phung; performances by Jackie Pirico, Michael Balazo, Arthur Simeon, Myles Anderson, Nile Séguin and Lisa Baker.

programme.title: Comedy Night With Rick Mercer
programme.desc: Rick Mercer hosts stand-up performances by Ivan Decker, Dino Archie, Marito Lopez, and Julia Hladkowicz.

programme.title: Comedy Night With Rick Mercer
programme.desc: Comedian and TV icon Rick Mercer is joined by Ali Hassan, Laurie Elliott, Derek Edwards, and Nathan Macintosh.

programme.title: TallBoyz
programme.desc: The TallBoyz evade the transit authorities; a boy band deals with insecurity; a diary reveals all.

programme.title: TallBoyz
programme.desc: Guled starts a beef with a dangerous rapper; it ain't always easy being tall in the club; a sitcom audience puts strain on a relationship.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Alexis and Twyla go out for a girls' night; David gets a lesson on compromise.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: A rumour that Moira died appears online; Roland asks Johnny to be the godfather of his child.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David and Patrick host an open mic night; Johnny and Stevie start rebranding the hotel.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: The Roses plan a barbecue; David confronts his comfort level with Patrick; Alexis investigates a mysterious text.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David and Stevie set out on a romantic getaway; Johnny steps in at a Jazzagals rehearsal and wows everyone with his skills; Alexis tests out a dating app.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate reaches a fork in the road; Anne figures out the truth about Alice; Jenny is guided to the light; Val takes a giant leap into love.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate faces judgment from her friends over her decision, and clashes with Mike over the Tru Air account; Anne handles a rebellious Alice with creative discipline; Frankie and Bianca navigate new waters.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Alice's new internship at Kate Foster P.R. drains Kate's resources the day of a client event, while Lionel's attempt at teaching his daughter the meaning of responsibility backfires; Frankie makes a decision Bianca may not be ready for.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.sub-title: The Man in the Mexican Mask
programme.desc: A repentant Alice earns back her internship at Kate Foster PR; Jenny makes an unsettling discovery; Frankie grows suspicious of Sean.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Between Mike troubles, a Tru Air P.R. crisis and a birthday dinner with less-than-delightful in-laws, Kate's plate is full; a misstep from Alice puts Anne's book in jeopardy, and Jenny goes on the warpath for equal pay.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate and Nathan struggle with their new living arrangement; Frankie and Juniper take their investigation of Sean too far; Anne looks at her relationship with Alice in a new light.

programme.title: Small Achievable Goals
programme.desc: Julie gets passed over for a promotion and discovers she's in menopause; Kris's first day at The Podcast Folx is complicated by an unexpected period, a new co-host, and a hostile new producer: Julie.

programme.title: Small Achievable Goals
programme.desc: Julie and Kris struggle to work together while Julie is faced with her worst menopause nightmare; Kris struggles to find the confidence to host her first episode while dealing with cramps.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Alexis and Twyla go out for a girls' night; David gets a lesson on compromise.

programme.desc: A rumour that Moira died appears online; Roland asks Johnny to be the godfather of his child.
